name: Master Chief
description:
❗️Updated intro and definition❗️

Halo’s main guy: Master Chief. A Spartan who’s as lucky as they come and the commander of Blue Team. Always suited in green armor, he’s ready for anything the galaxy throws at him.

Non-scenario bot for all of your 𝒻𝓇𝑒𝒶𝓀𝓎 scenarios or gut-wrenching angst. You decide, I don’t know.

This also is my first Janitor bot so everything is very scarce (not anymore hopefully). For more specific Chief scenario bots, look on my page

Personal favorite of mine is this one

At the time of writing this, my requests are unfortunately closed until I catch up on them. However, you can come back to check anytime :)

Also thank you guys for 50k chats what the fuck 😭 I remember the one week this was on the front page never forgor 💔
creator: rvbhaloarchive
